story.title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
story.summary: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

points.heading: New Feature: Claude Reflect
points.detail: "Reflect" is a built-in dashboard letting users track and visualize their Claude usage and broader AI habits.

points.heading: Shapes User AI Perception
points.detail: Reflect aims to shape how users think about AI, framing Claude as a vital productivity tool and mindful technology.

points.heading: Promotes Deeper AI Integration
points.detail: It helps users see Claude as a relied-upon tool and trains them to use AI better, suggesting features like Projects.

points.heading: User Data Privacy Focus
points.detail: Sensitive conversations appear at a high level only, health integration data is excluded, and no data is used for other purposes.
